The '''AR-25 transport''' was a ship used by [[Daedalus Gas Mines]] Corporation for gas mining on planets like [[Genarius]]. Called a "Bubbleship" or a "Bubblecraft," the AR-25 was a mid-sized [[Transport/Legends|transport]] vessel. Gases could be observed through its cargo hold, which was a thick-walled clear bubble. The levels of excitation of the gases could be observed or measured.

[[Erd Lumas]] was an AR-25 pilot as of [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].

{{Ship-stub}}
